name: ASRock A620M Pro RS Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x M.2 Key E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - Realtek GbE LAN
